case_title: MCGLADE, LOREN D. TRUSTEE, RADO INTERVIVOS TRUST VS SULCUS HOSPITALITY TECHNOLOGIES INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MCGLADE, LOREN D. TRUSTEE, RADO INTERVIVOS TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT SULCUS HOSPITALITY TECHNOLOGIES INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCGLADE, LOREN D. TRUSTEE, RADO INTERVIVOS TRUST IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SULCUS HOSPITALITY TECHNOLOGIES INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED RECEIPT SENT TO TRACY DEALLY (SULCUS HOSPITALITY) RETURNED SIGNED.
